articles.title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
articles.description: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

articles.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
articles.description: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

articles.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
articles.description: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.

articles.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
articles.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

articles.title: NYC Health + Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
articles.description: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
articles.description: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker — you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.

articles.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
articles.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

articles.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
articles.description: The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.

articles.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
articles.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

articles.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
articles.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

articles.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
articles.description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

articles.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
articles.description: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

articles.title: For Eclipse, the $2.5B Cerebras win is just the start of realizing its physical-world thesis
articles.description: Investing in the real world was lonely for Lior Susan 10 years ago. Now his firm finds itself at the center of the tech world's action.

articles.title: The haves and have-nots of the AI gold rush
articles.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

articles.title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
articles.description: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

articles.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
articles.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

articles.title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight

articles.description: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **SpaceX星舰基地发生工人死亡事故，OSHA介入调查**：美国职业安全与健康管理局（OSHA）正在调查SpaceX位于得克萨斯州的Starbase基地一起导致工人死亡的工伤事件。

2. **AI药物研发门槛降低，SandboxAQ将其模型引入Claude平台**：SandboxAQ宣布将其药物发现模型集成到Anthropic的Claude AI中，无需用户具备计算科学博士学位即可使用，降低AI制药门槛。

3. **Anthropic收购曾被OpenAI、谷歌等使用的开发者工具初创公司**：Anthropic收购了一家此前为OpenAI、谷歌和Cloudflare提供服务的开发工具初创公司，进一步强化其AI基础设施布局。

4. **纽约市医疗系统遭黑客攻击，超180万人医疗数据及指纹泄露**：NYC Health + Hospitals确认发生数据泄露事件，黑客窃取了至少180万患者的医疗信息和指纹数据。

5. **亚马逊Alexa+推出新功能，可自动生成播客节目**：亚马逊新版Alexa+具备AI生成播客的能力，用户可通过语音指令制作个性化播客内容。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI行业在药物研发、语音助手和开发者工具领域持续加速落地，同时数据安全与劳工安全问题也引发广泛关注。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **NVIDIA与Hugging Face推动视频生成与文档解析技术**：NVIDIA通过LoRA/DoRA微调Cosmos Predict 2.5模型用于机器人视频生成；PaddleOCR 3.5版本引入Transformers后端，提升OCR与文档解析能力；同时发布了开放Apache 2.0许可的多语言嵌入模型Granite Embedding Multilingual R2，支持32K上下文，在子亿参数模型中检索质量最佳。

2. **OpenAI深化企业合作与产品应用**：OpenAI与Dell合作将Codex引入混合云和本地企业环境；与马耳他政府合作向全体公民提供ChatGPT Plus；Databricks将GPT-5.5集成至企业代理工作流；并发布多篇博客详解业务运营、销售、数据科学团队如何使用Codex，以及个人财务管理新功能。

3. **AI代理与基础设施进展**：Hugging Face推出开放代理排行榜（Open Agent Leaderboard）；探讨连续批处理中的异步性优化；AWS发布用于基础模型训练与推理的构建模块；OpenAI还介绍了Sea公司对Codex在代理式软件开发中的未来展望，以及Codex的远程工作支持。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI正加速将Codex和ChatGPT Plus推向企业、政府及个人场景，同时Hugging Face社区在视频生成、OCR、多语言嵌入和代理评估等基础技术领域持续推出开源创新。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **历史与舆论斗争**：《环球时报》强调东京审判揭露了靖国神社的错误历史叙事，驳斥了日本右翼的颠倒黑白。
2. **科技与产业竞争**：多篇报道指出中国在人工智能、超级计算（如“LineShine”超算绕过GPU禁令）及AI API市场等领域展现出效率优势，正在超越美国；同时，英特尔计划利用中国手机供应链生产廉价笔记本电脑。
3. **地缘政治与经济博弈**：中美俄三国在静止轨道（GEO）展开竞争；澳大利亚要求中国关联投资者出售北方矿业股份；荷兰反对美国限制ASML对华出口；中国被指通过“隐形之手”影响全球石油市场。
4. **制造业与就业结构**：中国推动机器人应用的同时保持工人就业，而美国制造业增长放缓被部分归因于“中国冲击”。
5. **国际金融与市场动态**：中国出现低价购买Claude代币的灰色市场；有观点认为美国衰落与中国崛起并非长期趋势。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在AI和超算领域持续突破美国技术封锁，同时通过产业政策平衡自动化与就业，凸显其“效率护城河”与自主创新战略的全球影响力。
